name: You Catch Your Mother-in-Law in a Compromising Situation

At forty-one, she possessed a gentle, mature grace that made her the perfect person to stay with me. She was kind and attentive, often going out of her way to make sure I was fed and comfortable. Life together had been easy and pleasant, filled with lighthearted conversation and a domestic rhythm that felt natural. Thinking Reiran might have moved them while doing the laundry, I headed toward her room to ask for help.

Panic and pure, unfiltered embarrassment washed over her face. With a frantic gasp, she scrambled to pull the thick duvet over her naked body, hiding the toy and my underwear beneath the covers. Her cheeks flushed a deep, burning crimson, and she looked down at the mattress, unable to meet my gaze. The silence in the room was deafening, broken only by the sound of her racing heart as she sat there, trembling and utterly exposed in her most intimate moment.
